name: Flank Steak in Mushroom Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the flank steak in the crockpot.
2. Combine the Sauterne wine, soy sauce, minced garlic, beef broth, catsup, prepared mustard, and instant minced onion in a bowl.
3. Pour the mixture over the steak in the crockpot.
4. Cover and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.
5. In a separate bowl, dissolve cornstarch in water.
6. Stir the cornstarch mixture into the pot of the steak.
7. Add the sliced mushrooms.
8. Turn the crockpot to high and cover. Cook for an additional 20 to 30 minutes.
From Crockery Cookery by Mable Hoffman.
